title: Incorrect output when `$clog` used in nested function calls

features.name: clog2 in function return type declaration
features.description: Code should include a function with a return type that uses $clog2 to compute the width, such as a function returning signed [$clog2(X) - 1:0]

features.name: nested function call with clog2-derived width function
features.description: Code should include nested function calls where an outer function calls an inner function whose return type width is derived from $clog2

features.name: parameter used in clog2 within function signature
features.description: Code should include a parameter used as operand to $clog2 within a function's return type or argument declaration
